title: NoRaidTotems
description: Makes Evokers from raids not drop totems
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/75b33d3678b1bec86105670e60a4d4b95523885a.png)

## Description
NoRaidTotems is a vanilla friendly datapack/mod that makes Woodland Mansion Evokers useful again by removing the Totem drop from Raid Evokers

## Important notes
- NeoForge 1.20.6+ only
- Fabric 1.14.4+ only
- Datapack 1.14+

## How it works
It modifies Raid Evoker's loot-table removing the Totem of Undying drop, so it'll not be farmable anymore and you'll have to go to Woodland Mansions to earn Totems

## See More:
[CURSEFORGE](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/noraidtotems)
